features.description: A fresh agent can understand project state, startup commands, verification requirements, and next steps without prior chat history.
acceptance: Read `CLAUDE.md` for project architecture and non-negotiable engineering principles.
Read `progress.md` for current state, startup checklist, constraints, and session handoff.
Read `feature_list.json` for machine-readable acceptance criteria and verification status.
Confirm `AGENTS.md` remains a pointer to `CLAUDE.md`.
features.notes: Harness files updated in the attribution-eval enhancement session; `AGENTS.md` unchanged.

features.description: The project has a safe fresh-session bootstrap entry point for dependency setup and baseline verification.
acceptance: Run `./init.sh --skip-build` from the repository root and confirm it checks Bun availability and dependency setup.
Run `./init.sh` from the repository root and confirm it completes the default baseline verification.
Confirm `./init.sh --help` documents safe flags and does not include destructive cleanup or data reset behavior.
features.notes: Verified earlier on 2026-07-05; init.sh unchanged this session, and its steps (`bun install`, `bun run test`, `bun run build:web`) were each re-run individually and passed.

features.description: The deterministic offline test suite validates the core prompt/skill evaluation loops without network access.
acceptance: Run `bun run test` from the repository root.
Verify e2e prompt and skill tests pass using mock engine and mock judge paths.
Verify no real LLM endpoint or external network dependency is required for the test run.
features.notes: `bun run test` passed: 77 pass, 0 fail, 243 expect() calls across 12 files (new suites: trace, coverage, skillSpec, analysis).

features.description: The web assets can be built from the React SPA and Tailwind CSS sources.
acceptance: Run `bun run build:web` from the repository root.
Verify `public/app.css` and `public/main.js` are generated from `src/web/main.tsx`.
Run this check after UI or design-system changes before claiming UI readiness.
features.notes: `bun run build:web` bundles 23 modules from the React entry (`src/web/main.tsx`); `bunx tsc --noEmit` clean.

features.description: Prompt and Skill are modeled as peer evaluation targets with shared experiment infrastructure and different metric taxonomies.
acceptance: Verify `src/core/types.ts` keeps `TargetType` as `prompt | skill`.
Verify prompt metrics include instruction following, output quality, side-effect safety, and reliability.
Verify skill metrics include trigger accuracy, execution reliability, side-effect safety, and composition.
Verify tests cover both prompt and skill target end-to-end loops.
features.notes: `bun run test` passed prompt and skill e2e suites unchanged after the enhancement work.

features.description: Failed runs can be attributed through counterfactual replay to a concrete prompt, skill, tool, or base-model fix locus.
acceptance: Run an experiment with failing samples.
Run attribution for the experiment.
Verify attributions include counterfactual evidence, root cause, fix layer, trace step index, and suggested fix.
Verify prompt-instruction, wrong-skill-selection, skill-execution, tool-call, and base-model causes remain distinguishable.
features.notes: `bun run test` e2e attribution coverage passed; allowed-tools violations now classify as right-skill-executed-poorly with a concrete allowed-tools recommendation.

features.description: Candidate versions are blocked when pass^k or any category metric regresses against the baseline.
acceptance: Run an A/B prompt or skill experiment with a baseline and candidate version.
Verify pass^k mean, standard deviation, and delta are reported.
Verify the gate fails when any category metric regresses beyond the configured epsilon.
Verify pipeline artifacts include timing, grading, and benchmark JSON outputs.
features.notes: `bun run test` gate + pipeline artifact coverage passed.

features.description: Trace steps are ordered by actual start time and expose per-step time, duration, input/output, selected skill, tokens, and errors; run.error and step errors are clearly surfaced in the timeline and run detail.
acceptance: Verify `TraceStep` carries `startedAt` and `error` and engines populate them.
Verify `GET /api/runs/:id` returns steps sorted by `startedAt` (index fallback) plus `stepErrors`.
Verify the run page renders a run-error banner, step-error highlighting, tokens, wall-clock time and duration per step.
Run `bun test tests/trace.test.ts`.
features.notes: tests/trace.test.ts (7 tests) passing; browser check on run_mr6m1d864j1t0z showed the 503 run-error banner, red failing tool-call step, tokens and durations.

features.description: Skill evaluation aligns with the Agent Skills spec (agentskills.io): description-driven triggering, negative-trigger boundaries, allowed-tools grading, spec validation, and optimizer patches that encode negative examples.
acceptance: Verify `SkillDef` supports description, negativeTriggers, tools (allowed-tools), compatibility, metadata.
Verify `validateSkillDef` enforces the SKILL.md frontmatter constraints (name/description/compatibility rules).
Verify tool calls outside a skill's `tools` list fail a `tool-usage` assertion under execution_reliability and are attributable.
Verify `proposeSkillPatch` adds negativeTriggers from false-activation probes.
Run `bun test tests/skillSpec.test.ts`.
features.notes: tests/skillSpec.test.ts (9 tests) passing; `POST /api/skills/validate` wired into the new-target form with live spec feedback.

features.description: Samples carry capability × tier tags; coverage analysis reports the matrix, tier distribution vs the B40/A30/E20/R10 budget, and concrete gaps on the sample-set page and in reports.
acceptance: Verify `Sample` has `capability` and `tier` fields persisted through the repo (with migration for old DBs).
Verify `computeCoverage` returns cells, tier distribution vs targets, and empty-cell/tier-deficit/untagged gaps.
Verify `GET /api/sample-sets/:id/coverage` and the sample-set page matrix with gap list.
Run `bun test tests/coverage.test.ts`.
features.notes: tests/coverage.test.ts (5 tests) passing; browser check on the jira sample set showed the 3×4 matrix, tier budget line and 8 gaps after tagging 5 samples via `POST /api/samples/:id/coverage`.

features.description: Custom attribution agents (scenario + criteria) analyze an experiment's attribution items with tracked progress; reports render from customizable {{placeholder}} templates; the run page traces the full chain sample → run → trace → grading → attribution → agent findings.
acceptance: Create an agent via `POST /api/agents`; run `POST /api/experiments/:id/analyses` and verify done/total progress and findings.
Verify analysis progress appears on the sample-set page (`GET /api/sample-sets/:id/analyses`).
Generate a report via `POST /api/reports` with the built-in and a custom template; verify placeholder rendering.
Verify `GET /api/runs/:id` includes attribution and agent findings for the single-question chain.
Run `bun test tests/analysis.test.ts`.
features.notes: tests/analysis.test.ts (7 tests) passing; live check: agent skill-triage analyzed 8/8 items, report rpt_mr7i6g1c041c8p rendered metrics/causes/findings/coverage/actions, run page showed attribution + findings.

features.description: EngineKind=codex runs a minimal end-to-end experiment on the real codex CLI (target → sample set → experiment → run → trace → grading/attribution) via a repeatable opt-in command; default tests stay offline.
acceptance: Verify the codex engine parses `codex exec --json` JSONL events into timestamped trace steps with tokens and errors (offline unit tests).
Run `bun run e2e:codex` on a machine with codex + auth and verify exit 0 with artifacts (benchmark/runs/traces/attributions/result.md).
Verify the command exits 2 with an explicit blocker message when codex or auth is missing.
Verify `bun run test` requires no codex binary or network.
features.notes: VERIFIED on this machine (codex-cli 0.139.0, auth present): pass^1 = 1.0 on 2 samples, 0 engine errors, timestamped traces with token counts; artifacts in artifacts/codex-e2e/result.md. Event parsing covered offline in tests/trace.test.ts.

features.description: The web UI is a React 19 SPA following DESIGN.md (Material-inspired, minimal, data-dense) with zh/en i18n and concept help tooltips; no leftover dual architecture.
acceptance: Verify `src/web` contains only the React implementation (main.tsx, ui.tsx, pages/*.tsx, i18n.ts, api.ts, app.css).
Run `bun run build:web` and open the app; verify dashboard, targets, samples (matrix), experiments, run (timeline), attribution, agents, reports, settings routes render.
Verify concept help tooltips (pass^k, counterfactual, gate, side-effect levels, matrix, tiers, trace step) show accurate zh-CN copy.
Verify the language switcher toggles zh-CN/en-US.
features.notes: Old dom.ts/components.ts/pages/*.ts removed via git rm; browser walkthrough of dashboard, sample-set, run, reports pages rendered with zero console errors; tooltips verified in the dashboard snapshot.

features.description: DESIGN.md conforms to the google-labs-code/design.md specification.
acceptance: Verify YAML front matter with name, colors, typography, rounded, spacing, and components token maps.
Verify body sections use the canonical order (Overview, Colors, Typography, Layout, Elevation & Depth, Shapes, Components, Do's and Don'ts) with no duplicate headings.
features.notes: Rewritten against the spec fetched from github.com/google-labs-code/design.md; tokens mirror src/web/app.css @theme values.

conditional_reference_documents.use_when: Only when initializing, repairing, or auditing project harness files.
Only when adapting the reusable harness template to this project.
Mandatory for UI/UX work; otherwise read only when the task touches visual language, layout, components, states, or copy.
